dialog.errorFallback: Something went wrong in this dialog. Your payment entries are safe — close and try again.

SPLIT_TENDER.title: Split payment
SPLIT_TENDER.description: Take this payment with more than one method — for example cash and card together.

GIFT_CARD.title: Gift card
GIFT_CARD.description: Look up a gift card, enter its PIN if required, and apply an amount to this order.

PROMO_CODE.title: Promo code
PROMO_CODE.description: Enter a promo code to apply its discount to this order.

CUSTOMER_CREDIT.title: Store credit
CUSTOMER_CREDIT.description: Apply the customer's wallet, advance, or credit-note balance to this order.

B2B_ACCOUNT_BILLING.title: Account billing
B2B_ACCOUNT_BILLING.description: Add the contract and accounting details to bill this order to the customer's account.

FX_ROUNDING.title: Currency & rounding
FX_ROUNDING.description: This order settles at a non-base exchange rate; the applied rate and any rounding are shown for reference.

PAY_LATER.title: Balance policy
PAY_LATER.description: Choose how the remaining balance on this order is settled.

CASH_CARD_SPLIT.title: Cash + card split
CASH_CARD_SPLIT.description: Split this payment between cash and card.

OVERPAYMENT_ROUTING.title: Extra amount
OVERPAYMENT_ROUTING.description: Choose what to do with an overpayment — return change, or keep it as store credit or a receipt.
